[package]
name = "ritual-spc-verification"
version.workspace = true
edition.workspace = true
authors = ["Ritual Team <team@ritual.net>"]
description = "SPC proof verification system with caching and parallel processing"
atoms.semantic_claim: The downstream diff for crates/ritual-spc-verification/Cargo.toml introduces behavior or wiring that must be accounted for in the v2.2 merge target.
atoms.negative_test_candidate: Exercise the crates/ritual-spc-verification/Cargo.toml behavior boundary in the port and verify the downstream path-specific behavior still exists; absence or changed rejection/ordering would falsify the mapping.
atoms.notes: Old public SPC bridge/API compatibility remains deferred. The active nodebuilder binary compiles against the v2.2 tree without this bridge, and live verifier behavior is covered by ritual-block-verification, ritual-spc-signature, and tee-registry-reader.
atoms.required_change: No code change in this v2 slice; behavior is intentionally inactive or out of scope.

summary: Atoms in this file are intentionally absent or mapped to active v2.2 behavior where applicable.
